headline: Is It Time To Revisit First Solar (FSLR) After Its Recent Share Price Swings?
summary: If you are wondering whether First Solar's current share price still reflects good value, the next sections will walk through what the numbers say about the stock. The shares last closed at US$192.31, with returns of 1.6% over 30 days, a 29.9% decline year to date, and a 59.8% gain over the past year. These movements can change how the market is thinking about both upside and risk. Recent headlines around First Solar have largely focused on its role in the US solar supply chain and broader...

headline: Shares of semiconductors companies are trading higher amid overall market gain as supply chain concerns eased after the U.S. and Iran reached a ceasefire deal. Also, President Trump's social media post over the proposed 15-point agenda further lifted sentiments

headline: First Solar Series 7 Powers Dodson Creek As Valuation Gap Persists
summary: Geronimo Power's Dodson Creek Solar Project in Ohio has entered commercial operations using First Solar's Series 7 modules. The project represents a large scale U.S. utility solar installation supplied by First Solar (NasdaqGS:FSLR). The facility is expected to provide long term tax revenue for local communities while contributing to U.S. solar infrastructure. For investors watching the utility scale solar space, this project shows how First Solar's Series 7 technology is being used in real...

headline: Is First Solar (FSLR) Undervalued Or Overvalued After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent performance snapshot for First Solar First Solar (FSLR) has experienced both gains and declines across different timeframes. The share price is US$192.31, reflecting a 1-day return of about a 2% decline and a past 3-month return of nearly a 20% decline. See our latest analysis for First Solar.
